name: Felafel
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Soaked (1.5 hours) - boiled until very soft
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the chickpeas well, ensuring they are cooked enough to be mashable.
2. Combine the mashed chickpeas with the remaining ingredients.
3. Chill the mixture thoroughly.
4. Form the batter into one-inch-diameter balls using floured hands.
5. Dust each ball lightly with flour.
6. Heat oil in a heavy skillet to 365°F (175°C).
7. Deep fry the felafel until golden brown and serve immediately.
